ai.title: This temple in Japan has an AI monk, and yes, it’s giving sermons
ai.description: At Kyoto’s Shoren-in Temple, an AI-powered robot monk named Mindar is delivering Buddhist sermons, blending ancient philosophy with modern technology. Designed to complement human monks, it’s gone viral online, sparking debate about whether spirituality can be taught by machines and how younger generations are reshaping the way faith is experienced.

ai.title: San Jose Spotlight: San Jose Workers Want Safeguards From Ai
Tencent Cloud Partners with ComfyUI to Transform 3D Workflows in Open-Source AI
ai.description: HONG KONG, March 30, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Tencent Cloud, the cloud business of global technology company Tencent, today announced its partnership with ComfyUI, one of the world's most popular free, open-source, node-based visual AI platform for generative content creation. Through this collaboration, ComfyUI integrates Tencent HY 3D Global as its native Partner Nodes, enabling millions of creators worldwide to seamlessly incorporate advanced 3D generation workflows into their pipelines.
